title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
